name: motion/emphasis
title: Emphasis
description: Scale-and-settle entrance for a step-revealed element — the recipe behind 'the number lands'. Pairs with data-step; respects export, print, reduced-motion, and data-ls-motion kill switches.
useCases: landing a headline stat on its reveal step
punching a verdict or key claim after its evidence

motion.notes: Only fires on the reveal step; core transitions and stagger stay untouched. Use on at most one element per slide — emphasis rations itself.

useWhen: one number or claim deserves a physical landing on its reveal
avoidWhen: applied to several elements per slide — emphasis everywhere is emphasis nowhere

usage: Add ls-emphasize plus data-step to the element; the pop plays when the step reveals it.
Combine with components/stat for Appendix-B style 'stat emphasis (scale/settle)'.
